title: Update repo context and scaffold/rules for new artifacts
summary: Align RepoContext, scaffold script, and .rules template with canonical artifacts and semantic memory requirements.
outputs: Updated canonical artifact path mapping in repo_context.py
Updated zed-agentops-init.sh scaffold for new artifacts
Updated .rules template reflecting semantic resume and canonical precedence
acceptance_criteria: RepoContext defines canonical artifact filenames/paths under CWD/.agent.
Scaffold script creates/updates canonical artifacts for 0.4.0 schema.
Rules require semantic memory capture and canonical resume precedence.
Legacy artifact references are removed or explicitly marked derived-only.

steps.description: Update RepoContext artifact mapping to reflect canonical artifacts.
Update zed-agentops-init.sh to scaffold new artifacts and remove legacy references.
Revise .rules template to require semantic memory capture and canonical resume precedence.
